Job Overview

The Process Engineer II plays a critical role in supporting and optimizing the manufacturing of multi-layer capacitor devices. This position is responsible for ensuring that production processes remain efficient, reliable, and capable of delivering high-quality products with improved throughput and yield. The engineer will contribute to both sustaining and developing manufacturing processes, working cross-functionally to drive continuous improvement and operational excellence.
